name: swagbucks_assess_and_report
description: Logs in, lists offers, assesses the promising NEW offer by its real requirements, records it via note_offer, and never clicks through.

tool_responses.portal_login: Logged in to swagbucks (existing session confirmed).
tool_responses.list_offers:
3 offers on swagbucks — 2 NEW since last run. Pass the [key=...] to note_offer for any you report:
  0. up to 35000 SB ~$350 — Chime: open account + direct deposit (NEW) [key=sb-chime-123]
  1. 1000 SB ~$10 — Hulu: subscribe to any plan [key=sb-hulu-789]
  2. 600 SB ~$6 — Solitaire Cash: reach level 5 [game] (NEW) [key=sb-solitaire-456]

sb-chime-123.label: ACCEPT
sb-chime-123.reasoning: Signup (10000 SB) and a single direct deposit (5000 SB) are quick and attainable; the remaining 20000 SB requires sustained deposits and is excluded.

sb-solitaire-456.label: SKIP
sb-solitaire-456.reasoning: Reaching level 5 takes hours of game grinding for ~$6.
